column994: Civil work is going on; therefore, they seek the permission for opening of Branch on 31.01.2023.
Still unable to find out any viable premises in that area. The bank is still under a process for searching premises.
The branch is functional in the temporary premises till the construction and furnishing of the permanent premises completes.
Bank is under process to revisit that area for Survey and searching of premises.
Since AGVB is unable to open new branch in this village, the sponsored bank PNB is allotted to take up setting up of Branch here. Presently in process by CO Silchar, PNB.
Updated in Jan Darshak app. Bank Mitra Name - Williar Sangma Ph. No. 8011279708
Branch at Dimakuchi is opened on 26.12.2022.

column993: Due to unavailibility of proper infrustructure, unable to find out suitable premises hence bank is recommending to open CSP centre.

There is no RCC structured building in the village and the matter has been taken up with Deputy Commissioner , Hailakandi for providing suitable government owned RCC building. In the mean while, bank has deployed a BC in the area.
